description_long: This chair features a minimalist design with a gently curved wooden seat and backrest, both supported by a slender, powder-coated metal frame in a muted blue color. The seat and backrest are made from a single piece of wood, giving the chair a seamless and modern appearance. The frame consists of four straight legs, with the rear legs extending upward to support the backrest, creating a continuous and sturdy structure. The wood grain is visible, adding a natural texture and warmth to the otherwise industrial look. The chair lacks armrests, emphasizing its simple and functional form. Its lightweight construction and weather-resistant materials make it suitable for use in urban outdoor settings such as parks, patios, or sidewalk cafes.
description: A modern chair with a curved wooden seat and backrest, supported by a slender blue metal frame. The design is minimalist, functional, and suitable for outdoor urban environments.
description_view_0: Side view showing the gentle curve of the wooden seat and backrest, and the slim blue metal frame with four legs.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the wide wooden seat and backrest, framed by the blue metal structure with no armrests.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, again showing the continuous curve of the seat and backrest, and the simple leg design.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the full width of the wooden backrest and the upward extension of the rear legs.
